docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW FILED BY HILL, WILLIE SAFEWAY INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, WILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,873.89 FILED BY HILL, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HILL, WILLIE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, WILLIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC-LAWYERS INC.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-07-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANN MARIE EVANS - CLAIMS EXAMINER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
